source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.2 (1,1,1,2)
distilled_thesis: The recipients of light make solar happiness relational by naming those for whom shining has meaning.
